description.value:
Primary Energy: Negative 6 (binding soul fragments to corpses) Supporting Energy: Time 4 (duration 1 hour of control) Range: Touch Duration: 1 hour Total Cost: 10 Energy Action: Complex weave (2 actions) Weaving Roll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery Targeting Roll: Casting Stat + Negative Mastery Description: [FORBIDDEN KNOWLEDGE] Bind soul fragments or echoes to 1 corpse, animating it as a skeleton or zombie under your control. Undead has HP equal to your Negative Potential × 4, deals [[/damage 6]] damage, uses your Negative Mastery for attacks. Can command as [Free] action. Saving Throw: None Targeting Success Scaling:

  • 0 = Fails
  • 1 = 1 round
  • 2 = 1 hour
  • 3 = 4 hours

system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
